customer.title: I am a Customer
customer.description: Book verified professionals for your home repair, maintenance, and improvement needs.

technician.title: I am a Technician
technician.description: Manage your jobs, schedule, and earnings with our streamlined professional tools.

appTagline: The standard for home service excellence. Select your path to begin.
helpMessage: Customers can browse and schedule expert helpers. Technicians can manage service calls, checklists, timelines, and claim payouts.
